name: IRC_ASMT_PACKAGE_RESULTS
description: This table contains the package level assessment results for the submissions.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_RESULT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key value to IRC_SUBMISSIONS table.

columns.Name: APP_DRAFT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_CX_APP_DRAFTS table.

columns.Name: ICE_APP_DRAFT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_ICE_APP_DRAFTS table.

columns.Name: REQ_PACKAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_ASMT_REQ_PACKAGES table.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status code of the assessment package.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Package level comments provided by the partner.

columns.Name: BAND
columns.Comments: Band value provided by the partner.

columns.Name: PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: Percentile value provided by the partner.

columns.Name: SCORE
columns.Comments: Score value provided by the partner.

columns.Name: REQUESTED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the user who triggered the assessment package for the submission.

columns.Name: REQUEST_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which the assessment package was triggered for the submission.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: TRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: This column stores the number of failed tries made to invoke the partner service.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: DRAFT_ADDITIONAL_RESULTS
columns.Comments: Stores additional results payload for the draft application Assessments packages.
